content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(2, 6, 2), (3, 5, 2), (0, 9, 5), (3, 8, 5), (3, 4, 8), (0, 1, 10), (6, 7, 10), (7, 8, 10), (7, 9, 11), (1, 9, 14), (5, 7, 15), (1, 2, 17), (3, 6, 17), (2, 3, 18), (0, 4, 19)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 1 exactly at time 17.

First, we will go through each edge and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

* Edge (2, 6, 2) has node 2 and time 2. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (3, 5, 2) has node 3 and time 2. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (0, 9, 5) has node 0 and time 5. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (3, 8, 5) has node 3 and time 5. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (3, 4, 8) has node 3 and time 8. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (0, 1, 10) has node 0 and time 10. -> Add node 1.
* Edge (6, 7, 10) has node 6 and time 10. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (7, 8, 10) has node 7 and time 10. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (7, 9, 11) has node 7 and time 11. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (1, 9, 14) has node 1 and time 14. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (5, 7, 15) has node 5 and time 15. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (1, 2, 17) has node 1 and time 17. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (3, 6, 17) has node 3 and time 17. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (2, 3, 18) has node 2 and time 18. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (0, 4, 19) has node 0 and time 19. -> Add node 4.

Now we have the following nodes linked with node 1 at time 17: 2, 3, 6, 7, 8, 9, 1, 5, 4.

Answer: [2, 3, 6, 7, 8, 9, 1, 5, 4]
